description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: build and deploy. In the build stage add an update_readme job that runs curl -X POST -F token=$README_TOKEN -F ref=master -F variables[single_repo]=versions https://gitlab.com/api/v4/projects/7064305/trigger/pipeline. In the deploy stage add a push_github job that runs curl -sL https://gitlab.com/ludeeus/toolbox/raw/master/CI-Scripts/push_to_public_repo/init.sh | bash -s github HA-Custom_components root /versions and then curl -sL https://gitlab.com/ludeeus/toolbox/raw/master/CI-Scripts/push_to_public_repo/push.sh | bash -s Europe/Oslo. No specific Docker image or services are defined, so the default runner image is used.
